narration: Breaks into a run — covers ground.
effect: **Action.** Gain extra movement equal to base speed for this turn.

narration: Steps deliberately back — moves without provoking the swing.
effect: **Action.** Movement this turn doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

narration: Drops into a low, weaving stance — eyes everywhere at once.
effect: **Action.** Until start of next turn: attacks against this NPC have disadvantage (if NPC can see the attacker) AND this NPC has advantage on Dex saves. Lost if incapacitated or speed drops to 0. Apply `@dodging` to track.

narration: Lunges in and clamps onto the target — wraps arms / paws / coils.

roll.label: Athletics (grapple)
roll.notes: Athletics contest vs target's Athletics OR Acrobatics. On success: target is **grappled** (speed 0). Use `@grappled` on the target's tab to track. Escape is the target's action: another contest.

narration: Distracts the target or steadies the ally's grip.
effect: **Action.** Pick one ally within 5 ft. They gain **advantage** on their next attack roll OR ability check (target must be specified). Lasts until the start of this NPC's next turn.

narration: Slips behind cover — flattens against a surface, holds breath.

roll.label: Stealth
roll.notes: Compare to each unaware PC's passive Perception. PCs whose PP > result spot the NPC. Requires cover or distraction.

narration: Sets feet and shoves — leverages weight against the target.

roll.label: Athletics (push)
roll.notes: Athletics contest vs target's Athletics OR Acrobatics. On success: push target 5 ft. Pass `modifier` per-NPC at call time if Athletics > +0.

narration: Hooks a leg / drives downward — drops the target flat.

roll.label: Athletics (shove prone)
roll.notes: Athletics contest vs target's Athletics OR Acrobatics. On success: apply `@prone` to the target. Melee attackers gain advantage; ranged attackers have disadvantage on hits.

prerequisite: PC within 60 ft just started casting a spell Aelric can see; uses Aelric's reaction
narration: He snaps his fingers — frost crackles in the air between his hand and the caster, and their magic shatters into glittering motes.

roll.label: Counterspell ability check
roll.notes: Auto-counters spells of level 3 or lower (Counterspell is cast at 3rd-level). For 4th-level+ spells, this roll must beat DC **10 + spell level** to negate. DM tracks reaction usage — Counterspell shares Aelric's one-per-round reaction slot with Shield.

trigger.match: any creature casts a spell within 60 ft

narration: Aelric whispers a single word; warmth spreads from his palm.
effect: Restore 2d8+3 HP to one ally within 30 ft. (use as bonus or main action; 3/day slots)

narration: Aelric extends a frost-rimed hand; a beam of pale cold lances out, leaving a trail of crystallizing air.
He sweeps both hands skyward — hailstones the size of fists rip down through a 20-ft cylinder of swirling cold.

prerequisite: free hand for somatic; not wearing armor
narration: He traces a sigil in the air around himself — a faint blue shimmer settles like a second skin.
effect: Aelric's AC becomes **15** for 8 hours (or until dispelled / another instance is cast on him). Usually already active when combat starts — only recast if dispelled.

prerequisite: Aelric must be conscious; uses one of 3 daily slots
narration: Mist coils around him for an instant — and then he's gone, reappearing 30 ft. away in a swirl of frost.
effect: **Bonus action.** Aelric teleports up to **30 ft.** to an unoccupied space he can see. Does not trigger opportunity attacks. (3/day — track uses; refresh on long rest.)

prerequisite: Aelric was hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile; uses Aelric's reaction
narration: A wall of invisible force flickers into being at the last instant, deflecting the blow.
effect: **Reaction.** +5 AC against the triggering attack (often turns a hit into a miss) AND until the start of Aelric's next turn. Also auto-negates Magic Missile. Shares reaction slot with Counterspell.

trigger.match: Aelric is hit by an attack (any range)
any damage (uses reaction once per round)

narration: The shape blurs — the spirit slides through stone and flesh alike, repositioning beyond reach.
effect: Move up to 40 ft (or fly 40 ft hover) without provoking opportunity attacks. Can pass through walls/creatures. Takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

narration: The spirit lashes out — two ghostly claws rake through the air, leaving frost-mist trails.
The spirit splits its jaws — a piercing wail of layered voices ripples outward, scouring the mind.

trigger.match: attacked by a visible attacker (declared after seeing the roll)

narration: Space ripples around the strike — the blow lands on a place the beholder almost was.
effect: +2 AC against the triggering attack (declared AFTER seeing the attack roll). If this changes a hit to a miss, the attack misses.

narration: Pressure folds onto a thrall — its head jerks once, and the body obeys.
effect: Bonus action (1/turn). Target one creature charmed by the beholder within 60 ft. [ASK PLAYER: DC 16 Cha save] — on a fail, the target moves up to 30 ft toward the beholder or a target the beholder designates.

narration: Reality folds at one point — a needle of force lances toward the target, unmaking everything along the line.

attacks.name: Disintegration Ray
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this damage reduces the target to 0 HP, target is disintegrated — cannot be restored except by true resurrection or wish.

narration: The space around a divine vessel buckles — something at its center reaches in and pulls.
effect: Legendary (3 actions). Target one creature within 30 ft with spell slots or divine power. [ASK PLAYER: DC 16 Cha save]. On a fail: target loses one spell slot of the highest level it has remaining (or one use of a divine ability if it has no slots), and the beholder gains temporary HP equal to TWICE the spell level lost.

narration: The stone beneath the void-thing cracks and scars as it simply refuses failure.
effect: Choose to succeed on a failed saving throw. 3/day.

narration: Dominated thralls jerk upright — the beholder's hunger flares outward and they move on borrowed will.
effect: Lair action (init 20). Up to 3 derro charmed by the beholder within 60 ft gain temporary HP equal to the beholder's Charisma modifier (+1, minimum 1). Each may IMMEDIATELY use its reaction to move up to its speed OR make one weapon attack.

narration: The void-gap opens — the silence becomes teeth.

attacks.name: Maw
attacks.rider_on_hit: If the target is grappled by the beholder, this attack is a critical hit instead.

narration: Four spine-tentacles lash from beneath the void-sphere — two find flesh, and the gap of a mouth descends with them.

attacks.name: Tentacle Lash 1
attacks.rider_on_hit: target is automatically grappled (no save; escape DC 16 — Athletics or Acrobatics)

attacks.name: Tentacle Lash 2
attacks.rider_on_hit: target is automatically grappled (no save; escape DC 16 — Athletics or Acrobatics)

attacks.name: Maw
attacks.rider_on_hit: If the target is grappled by the beholder, this attack is a critical hit instead.

narration: Slides 30 ft through air and stone alike — the chamber barely notices its passage.
effect: Bonus action. Move up to 30 ft. Beholder can move THROUGH creatures and objects as difficult terrain. If it ends its turn inside a creature/object, it takes 5 (1d10) force damage and is shunted to the nearest empty space.

narration: One spine-tentacle whip-cracks out — fast, joint-flexible, and stronger than it looks.

attacks.name: Tentacle Lash
attacks.rider_on_hit: target is automatically grappled (no save; escape DC 16 — Athletics or Acrobatics check)

narration: Stone buckles under one of the intruders — old rune-lines flex like rope.
effect: Lair action (init 20). Target one creature the beholder can see within 60 ft. [ASK PLAYER: DC 16 Dex save] — on a fail, target falls PRONE.

narration: The altar coughs a soundless pulse — force ripples in a tight ring around the seal.
A second, smaller fold of force lances out — not the full Disintegration, but enough.
Reality unhitches — a sound that wasn't sound rolls outward; the chamber forgets itself for a half-second.

save.notes: Creatures within 10 ft of the shrine have DISADVANTAGE on this save. On a FAILED save, target is also FRIGHTENED of the beholder for 1 minute (DC 16 Wis save ends at end of each of the target's turns).

narration: Sights down the crossbow with practiced calm — bolt hisses across the gap.
Two clipped, drilled axe-strikes — Deep Watch keeps formation; the swings come in sequence, not flourish.

prerequisite: Rager cannot move on this turn. One Greataxe attack vs EACH enemy creature in reach (does not hit allied ragers or other friendly NPCs). Madness Endurance: if this rager took damage since its last turn, add +1 to each to-hit roll. Incoming Damage Aggro: if a specific enemy hit this rager since its last turn, the first attack vs THAT creature has advantage (first attack line only; stacks with +1). Cap output at enemies actually in reach — DB always shows 3 lines.
narration: Plants its feet and spins — the greataxe carves a horizontal arc through everything hostile in range.

prerequisite: Madness Endurance: if this rager took damage since its last turn, add +1 to each to-hit roll. Incoming Damage Aggro: if a specific enemy hit this rager since its last turn, the first attack vs THAT creature has advantage (stacks with Madness Endurance +1 — apply advantage first, then add +1).
narration: Two huge greataxe arcs — pain-fueled, eyes too white, breathing too fast.
Roars a guttural challenge — eyes locking on the chosen target.
effect: Target one creature within 30 ft. [ASK PLAYER: DC 12 Cha save] — on a fail, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls against any creature other than the rager until the end of its next turn.

narration: Voice cuts strangely loud across the chamber — names the next strike.
effect: Choose one ally the shardcaller can see within 30 ft. That ally has ADVANTAGE on its next attack roll before the end of the shardcaller's next turn.

narration: Two obsidian shards spit from a pouch — quick whip-snaps of the wrist.
Unleashes a spitting fan of obsidian — shards hum through the air along a tight line.
Skitters back along the stone — eyes never leaving the front line.
effect: Move up to 30 ft directly away from the nearest enemy. This movement does NOT provoke opportunity attacks.

narration: The spider drives its fangs deep; venom pumps into the wound.
The spider rears and sprays a thick rope of webbing across the gap.
effect: One creature the spider can see within 60 ft: [ASK PLAYER] DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a fail, the target is Restrained until the web is destroyed (the web is an object: AC 10, HP 5, Vulnerable to fire, Immune to poison and psychic damage). Recharge 5-6 -- roll 1d6 at the start of the spider's turn; the web is available again on a 5 or 6.

narration: The wolf spider scuttles in fast, sinks its fangs, and skitters back.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: On a hit, the target makes a DC 11 Constitution save: [ASK PLAYER] -- 2d4 poison damage on a fail, half as much on a success.

narration: Hocks a glob of supercooled bile from a glacial gland in its throat.
Throws its head back and bellows a wave of stinging frost.
It lunges, raking with two crystalline claws and snapping its rime-fanged maw.

prerequisite: Stalker must move at least 20 ft. straight at the target this turn
pre_save: DC 15 Str save vs prone (target gets disadvantage on the bite to-hit if knocked prone — DM, apply if save fails)
narration: Coils, then explodes off the ice and slams shoulder-first.
Shards of ice erupt where the blow lands.
Folds itself into a snowdrift; only the steam of its breath gives it away.

roll.label: Stealth
roll.notes: Compare result to each PC's passive Perception; PCs whose PP > result are fooled.

narration: Bowstrings sing. A volley of crude arrows hisses across the gap.
The pack swarms — claws rake and jaws snap in a frenzy of dust and snow.
The boss barks an order and lays in with the scimitar -- two swift, vicious cuts.

attacks.name: Scimitar 1
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage, add 1d4 slashing damage.

attacks.name: Scimitar 2
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage, add 1d4 slashing damage.

narration: The boss slips back through the rubble, shouting for cover.
effect: Bonus action: take the Disengage or Hide action. Available every turn.

trigger.match: the boss is hit by an attack while a goblin ally is within 5 ft

narration: The boss yanks a shrieking raider into the path of the blow and slips clear.
effect: When the boss is hit by an attack and a Small or Medium goblin ally is within 5 ft: the boss and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target -- apply the attack's damage to the raider, not the boss. One reaction per round.

narration: The boss snaps off two quick shots from the back of the warband.

attacks.name: Shortbow 1
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage, add 1d4 piercing damage.

attacks.name: Shortbow 2
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage, add 1d4 piercing damage.

narration: The goblin scrambles back over the rubble, quick and low.
effect: Bonus action: take the Disengage or Hide action. Available every turn — use it to kite behind boulder cover and stay hidden.

narration: The goblin darts in low and slashes with a notched scimitar.

attacks.name: Scimitar
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage (e.g. an ally within 5 ft of the target), add 1d4 slashing damage.

narration: The goblin looses an arrow from behind cover, then ducks back down.

attacks.name: Shortbow
attacks.rider_on_hit: If this attack had Advantage, add 1d4 piercing damage.

narration: Grek lays a hand on the wound; a precise warmth spreads, sealing torn flesh.
effect: Restore 1d8+3 HP to one ally Grek can touch. Once Grek has cast it, the slot is gone until long rest.

narration: Grek mutters and stamps a tinkered glyph; a mote of fire arcs from his palm.
Grek's shoulder-mounted Force Ballista whirs; a thrumming bolt of force lances out.
Grek mutters; a tiny gadget flickers — light, sound, recorded message, or pin-prick mark.
effect: Minor magic on a tiny object (one of: light, sound, recorded message, odor, identifying mark). Roleplay tool, not combat-action.

prerequisite: An ally gnoll within 5 ft just dropped to 0 HP; uses reaction (once per turn)
narration: Jorran tears into the fallen's flesh — the eating-rite, brief and sacred.
effect: **Reaction.** Gain 5 temporary HP AND advantage on the next attack roll before the end of Jorran's next turn. Mark this action USED via the right-click menu after firing.

narration: Jorran roars — fangs and raking claws lash out as one.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: If lunar (night) — DM, add +1d4 to the first attack this round

narration: Jorran swings the dwarf-forged pickaxe — the trophy of his first kill.
A sheath of magical frost rimes Maela's skin; her breath fogs.
effect: Cast at 2nd level: gain 10 temporary HP. While any temp HP remains, melee attackers take 10 cold damage on hit.

narration: Maela's eyes flash; twin beams of violet force lance out, one chasing the other.
Maela whispers her patron's name; a dark sigil shimmers above the target.
effect: Concentration, up to 1 hour. Pick a target + ability. Deal +1d6 necrotic on EACH of your attacks against that target. The target has disadvantage on chosen ability checks. Moves with target.

narration: Maela spreads her fingers; three jagged rays of fire arc from her hand.

prerequisite: An ally gnoll within 5 ft just dropped to 0 HP; uses reaction (once per turn)
narration: The matron lowers her head; the eating-rite is brief, ancient, sacred.
effect: **Reaction.** Gain 5 temporary HP AND advantage on the next attack roll before the end of the matron's next turn.

narration: The matron touches the target — voices layer, then settle into the chosen one's bones.
effect: Pick an ally and an ability score. They gain advantage on ability checks of that score for 1 hour. (Str = also doubles carry; Con = +2d6 temp HP.) DM applies via the LLM or `note`.

prerequisite: Once per day (night-only); manually mark USED via the right-click chip menu
narration: A column of pale moonlight lances down where the matron points — flesh sears as it touches the beam.
The matron strikes — fangs and claws in a single, fluid motion.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: If lunar (night) — DM, add +1d4 to the first attack this round

narration: Pale fire blooms in the matron's palm; she flicks it at the target.
The matron's voice deepens; the hyenas still, listening.
effect: **Roleplay only.** The matron can converse with beasts (including the valley hyenas) for 10 minutes. Use this if the party tries to negotiate with the pack.

narration: Orren explodes into motion — two more strikes inside one breath.
effect: Take one additional action this turn (typically another longsword_multiattack). Available once per short rest.

narration: Orren steps in low and high — a measured cut, then a second.
Orren plants his feet and steadies his breath — pain fades, briefly.
effect: Bonus action. Regain 1d10+4 HP. Available once per short rest.

narration: Throws back its head — the runes flare and the air ripples with the god's bottled echo.

save.notes: On a failed save, target also takes 1d4 psychic damage (shrine feedback — roll separately). ⚠️ Any caster who failed this save must make a Concentration check (DC = max(10, half total damage taken)).

narration: Lurches back toward the altar — drawn home like a moth to a sealed flame.
effect: Move up to 30 ft. This movement does NOT provoke opportunity attacks. If the derro is not currently in sight of combat, the movement MUST be toward the shrine.

narration: Two strikes from the rune-carved axe — flesh splits with a darker bleed where the runes touch.

trigger.match: took melee damage from a visible attacker within 5 ft

narration: Snaps an unprovoked counter-swing — the shrine punishes it for letting itself be hit.
effect: Make one Shrine-Axe melee attack against the attacker — +4 to hit, on hit 1d8+1 slashing + 1d8 necrotic. Regardless of whether the attack hits, the shrine-touched derro takes 2 (1d4) psychic damage as the shrine's power consumes it from within.

narration: Lurches forward — dagger goes for an opening with a flicker of the dwarf still inside.
One jerky, puppeted swing — the body remembers how to hold an axe but not why.
The gnoll lunges — claws and fangs in a single sweep.

prerequisite: An ally gnoll within 5 ft just dropped to 0 HP; uses reaction (once per turn)
narration: She kneels to the fallen, jaws working — the eating-rite, swiftly done.
effect: **Reaction.** Gain 5 temporary HP AND advantage on the next attack roll before the end of the lieutenant's next turn.

narration: The lieutenant strikes — bite and claws in a tight, practiced combo.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: If lunar (night) — DM, add +1d4 to the first attack this round

narration: The hyena lunges in, jaws snapping.
Vessa moves — fast, low, gone before anyone tracks her.
effect: Bonus action. Choose: Dash, Disengage, or Hide. Available every turn.

narration: A muffled thwip — a quarrel jumps from Vessa's hand crossbow.
Vessa slips in close; her shortsword finds the gap between plates.

trigger.match: an attacker Vessa can see hits her with an attack

narration: Vessa twists at the last instant; the blow lands at half-force.
effect: Halve the damage from one incoming attack this round. Uses Vessa's reaction.

narration: Zor'gar's rage tips into frenzy — the world narrows to teeth and edge.
effect: Bonus action while raging: make one additional melee attack on each of your turns. After frenzy ends, gain 1 level of exhaustion.

narration: Zor'gar roars; the greataxe carves the air in a wide, brutal arc.
Zor'gar bares teeth, locks eyes — the rage rises, slow and inexorable.
effect: Bonus action. For up to 1 minute: advantage on Str checks/saves, +2 damage on Str-based melee, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing. Ends if you don't attack or take damage for a turn.

narration: Zor'gar abandons his guard; every blow lands harder — and so does every one against him.
effect: Before the first attack on your turn: gain advantage on STR-based melee attack rolls this turn. Attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.
